title: Add upper bound and skew detection to Meshtastic position timestamp validation
description: Implement the requirements from gv4z: add upper bound and skew detection against current time in set_position_fix_time in lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c. Reject future timestamps with clear error. Must cover C/Zephyr/meshtastic and all tests. Follow strict codereview process with 3 passes after every logical chunk, filing all findings (including P4) as codereview-tagged beads. Do not close gv4z or epic until 3 clean passes with no open findings. Explore adapter.c first.
close_reason: Epic completed with all subtasks and codereview passes clean after fixes
